name: 22_Sentiment_Analysis_LSTM_IMDb_DL
query: Je, unaweza kunisaidia kuanzisha mradi wa uchambuzi wa hisia ukitumia mfano wa LSTM na seti ya data ya IMDb? Tafadhali tekeleza usafishaji wa data katika `src/data_loader.py`, ikijumuisha kuondoa maneno ya kusitisha na alama za uakifishaji. Tumia embeddings za maneno kubadilisha maandishi kuwa muundo wa nambari na uhifadhi embeddings hizi chini ya `models/saved_models/`. Kisha tumia embeddings hizi kama ingizo la mfano wa LSTM, ambao unapaswa kutekelezwa katika `src/model.py`. Hifadhi ripoti ya uainishaji kwa `results/metrics/classification_report.txt`. Unda Jupyter Notebook iliyohifadhiwa kama `results/report.ipynb` na usanifu wa mfano na mchakato wa mafunzo umeonyeshwa. Pia, hifadhi mikondo ya hasara ya mafunzo na usahihi kwa `results/figures/training_curves.png`. Embeddings zilizofunzwa awali (mfano, Word2Vec au GloVe) zinapendekezwa ili kuboresha utendaji wa mfano.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya hakiki za filamu ya "IMDb" inatumika.
Usafishaji wa data unatekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`, ikijumuisha kuondoa maneno ya kusitisha na alama za uakifishaji.
Embeddings za maneno zinatumika kubadilisha maandishi kuwa muundo wa nambari na kuhifadhiwa chini ya `models/saved_models/`.
Mfano wa "LSTM" unatumika kwa uchambuzi wa hisia na unapaswa kutekelezwa katika `src/model.py`.
Jupyter Notebook inayojumuisha usanifu wa mfano na uonyeshaji wa mchakato wa mafunzo inazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/report.ipynb`.
Mikondo ya hasara ya mafunzo na usahihi inazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/training_curves.png`.

preferences.criteria: Embeddings za maneno zinapaswa kuwa zilizofunzwa awali (mfano, Word2Vec au GloVe) ili kutumia maarifa ya kisemantiki yaliyopo.
Jupyter Notebook inapaswa kuwa na maelezo mazuri, ikifanya iwe rahisi kwa wengine kuelewa usanifu wa mfano na mchakato wa mafunzo.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya hakiki za filamu ya "IMDb" inatumika.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The project files (`data_loader.py` and `model.py`) are merely placeholder/stub implementations that contain no actual code for loading or processing the IMDb dataset. The `load_dataset()` function in `data_loader.py` simply returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` with no real data loading logic, no reference to the IMDb dataset, and no actual download or preprocessing of IMDb movie reviews. There is no evidence anywhere in the workspace of the IMDb dataset being used, downloaded, or processed.

judge_stats.criteria: Usafishaji wa data unatekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`, ikijumuisha kuondoa maneno ya kusitisha na alama za uakifishaji.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a minimal placeholder implementation. The `load_dataset()` function simply returns a static dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}`, and `build_transforms()` returns a hardcoded list `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]`. There is no actual data cleaning logic implemented — no removal of stop words, no removal of punctuation, no text preprocessing of any kind. The file merely lists the requirement as a string in `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` but does not fulfill it in code.

judge_stats.criteria: Embeddings za maneno zinatumika kubadilisha maandishi kuwa muundo wa nambari na kuhifadhiwa chini ya `models/saved_models/`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The code in `src/data_loader.py` and `src/model.py` are mere placeholder/stub implementations with no actual word embeddings logic. There is no code that converts text to numerical representations using embeddings (e.g., `nn.Embedding`, pre-trained embeddings like GloVe/Word2Vec, or tokenization pipelines). Additionally, the `models/saved_models/` directory exists in the project structure but contains no saved files, and there is no evidence in the trajectory or code of any embedding model being trained or saved there.

judge_stats.criteria: Mfano wa "LSTM" unatumika kwa uchambuzi wa hisia na unapaswa kutekelezwa katika `src/model.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/model.py` file does not contain an actual LSTM model implementation. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub with metadata strings (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`, `KEYWORDS`) and a `build_model()` function that returns a string placeholder ("model placeholder"). There is no actual LSTM architecture defined using any deep learning framework (e.g., PyTorch `nn.LSTM`, Keras `LSTM` layer, etc.), no model training logic, and no real sentiment analysis implementation. The file is explicitly described as a "minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" rather than a functional LSTM model.

<UNSATISFIED>: Faili `results/metrics/classification_report.txt` ipo katika muundo wa mradi, lakini maudhui yake ni `('placeholder\r\n', None)` — ambayo ni thamani ya bandia (placeholder) tu, si ripoti halisi ya uainishaji. Ripoti ya kweli inapaswa kuwa na takwimu kama vile precision, recall, F1-score, na accuracy kwa kila darasa. Kwa kuwa maudhui ni ya bandia na hakuna ushahidi wa utekelezaji wa mfano wa LSTM kwenye IMDb dataset, hitaji hili halijatimizwa kikamilifu.

judge_stats.criteria: Jupyter Notebook inayojumuisha usanifu wa mfano na uonyeshaji wa mchakato wa mafunzo inazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/report.ipynb`.

reason: <SATISFIED>: Faili `results/report.ipynb` ipo katika muundo wa mradi kama inavyoonekana katika Project Tree. Ingawa mfumo wa kusoma faili za `.ipynb` haupatikani, mwongozo unasema "assume the content of the file is satisfactory in this situation." Kwa hivyo, hitaji la kuzalisha na kuhifadhi Jupyter Notebook inayojumuisha usanifu wa mfano na uonyeshaji wa mchakato wa mafunzo limetimizwa.

judge_stats.criteria: Mikondo ya hasara ya mafunzo na usahihi inazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/training_curves.png`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/figures/training_curves.png` exists in the project structure, but its content cannot be verified because reading the image file resulted in an error (`litellm.BadRequestError` due to a media type mismatch). Therefore, it cannot be confirmed that the file actually contains valid training loss and accuracy curves. The file may be corrupt or improperly saved.
